structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoint assignments by Zone Group mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints (Cooling maximum, Minimum, Heating maximum) are set according to the Zone Group mode as shown in Table 5.5.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode (Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set endpoints: Cooling max: Vcool-max in Occupied/Cooldown/Setup, 0 in others; Minimum: Vmin in Occupied, 0 in others; Heating max: Vheat-max in Occupied, Vcool-max in Warmup/Setback, 0 in others.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.5.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vcool-max Vcool-max 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking damper commissioning check
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For leaking damper detection, force all VAV boxes in a Zone Group closed and record airflow at the AHU to check for leakage.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning override: all zone dampers forced closed
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Measure and record AHU airflow to detect overall leakage.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Force all VAV boxes closed, record AHU airflow.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: For example, the commissioning authority (CxA) can check for leaking dampers by forcing all VAV boxes in a Zone Group closed and then recording airflow at the AHU.

evidence_quote: For example, the commissioning authority (CxA) can check for leaking dampers by forcing all VAV boxes in a Zone Group closed and then recording airflow at the AHU.
evidence_text: For example, the commissioning authority (CxA) can check for leaking dampers by forcing all VAV boxes in a Zone Group closed and then recording airflow at the AHU.
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: commissioning evidence lacks procedure/check action
